calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-23-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: J. Murphy, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840
Petitioners Demyan Smilovitsky and Milana Targan; father and mother of minor present in court.
Petitioners sworn and examined through Cantonese Interpreter
Proof of Publication on file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor 1. from Nathaniel Emilio Smilovitsky to Nathaniel Targan Zubatov. Minor 2. Filip Ray Smilovitsky from to Filip Ray Zubatov. The court also grants the name change of father to Demyan Zubatov.
Decree Changing Names signed in open court.
